publication.changeSummary: Deterministic misconception item for Sequence; blocked from formal exams until independent human review.

items.title: Sequence: correct the failure model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this documented beginner mistake? Independent-looking lines may be freely reordered because a program eventually executes all of them anyway.

examEligibility.rationale: The deterministic answer and rubric are AI-assisted draft content awaiting independent human approval.

hints: Compare both options with the canonical model, declared boundary, and observable evidence in the lesson.

feedback.correct: Correct. Preserve data and effect dependencies by tracing the state after each statement and moving a statement only when its reads and writes remain valid.
feedback.incorrect: The selected statement preserves the documented misconception. Preserve data and effect dependencies by tracing the state after each statement and moving a statement only when its reads and writes remain valid.

criteria.description: Selects the source-aligned correction for Sequence instead of the documented misconception.

privateAuthorNotes: Human reviewer must verify the correction against the cited source and ensure the misconception option is plausible without reinforcing it.

options.text: Preserve data and effect dependencies by tracing the state after each statement and moving a statement only when its reads and writes remain valid.
Independent-looking lines may be freely reordered because a program eventually executes all of them anyway.
